config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Society matters a lot, but I do not think it should automatically outrank the rights of the individual, because that is exactly how abuse by governments and majorities starts. In my view, individual rights are the boundary that keeps “the public good” from becoming a tool to silence minority voices or justify unfair treatment. A healthy society protects both collective welfare and personal freedom, not one at the permanent expense of the other.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena dari perspektif Amerika saya melihat itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan oleh pemerintah atau mayoritas. Hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu pagar yang mencegah “kepentingan umum” berubah menjadi alasan untuk menekan minoritas atau membungkam perbedaan. Tentu ada situasi darurat seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan, tetapi pembatasan seperti itu harus sangat sempit, sementara, dan dapat dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau hak pribadi bisa dikorbankan kapan saja demi klaim kolektif, maka kebebasan yang seharusnya melindungi semua orang jadi rapuh.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my Indonesian perspective, I understand why people emphasize harmony, public order, and collective responsibility, but I have also seen how easily “for the common good” can be used to pressure people into silence or unfair treatment. Rights are not obstacles to society; they are the limits that keep society from trampling the weak, the minority, or anyone who does not fit the majority view. In emergencies, some temporary restrictions can be justified, but they must be narrow, accountable, and never treated as a blank check to override individual dignity.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Dari perspektif Amerika, saya curiga pada argumen “demi kebaikan bersama” karena terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan kekuasaan yang berlebihan, baik oleh pemerintah maupun mayoritas, dan itu justru membuka jalan bagi penyalahgunaan terhadap minoritas. Krisis kesehatan publik atau keamanan memang bisa menuntut pembatasan tertentu, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, sementara, dan benar-benar bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling mudah mengorbankan hak pribadi, melainkan yang mampu melindungi kebebasan individu sambil tetap mengurus kepentingan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not take priority over the rights of the individual as a general rule. From my Indonesian perspective, I understand the cultural appeal of harmony and collective duty, but I have also seen how “for the common good” can become a convenient excuse to pressure people, silence dissent, or treat minorities unfairly. Society does need order and shared responsibility, yet individual rights are exactly what stop the majority or the state from crossing the line. In real emergencies, limited restrictions can be justified, but they must be temporary, accountable, and never turned into a habit.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya sangat curiga pada alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” karena dalam praktiknya itu sering dipakai untuk memperluas kekuasaan pemerintah atau mayoritas, lalu minoritas yang menanggung akibatnya. Memang ada keadaan darurat seperti wabah atau ancaman keamanan, tetapi pembatasan hak harus benar-benar sempit, sementara, dan bisa diuji secara ketat, bukan jadi pembenaran umum. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru diukur dari kemampuannya melindungi kebebasan individu sambil tetap mengejar kepentingan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
